data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 679ac75b9bc3 is on main, (2) all 4 CI pipelines (CI, Repo Hygiene, Changesets Version PR, Release) passed green, (3) all commit tags present (commit:b6b3174d7fde, commit:0678619e9b75, commit:679ac75b9bc3, commit:8c89222c279b), (4) no regressions — branch contained only the two implementation commits plus the merge. Approved for shipped.
